problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
